macro.title: Regional markets back demand resilience as rate pressure builds
macro.what: Housing demand remains resilient across major metros as mortgage rates rise
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Insurance is having a growing impact on condo affordability
housing.what: On Wednesday, Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac adopted extensive changes to their requirements for approvals of condominium projects that are eligible for their loan purchase
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Former Fannie Mae CEO Hugh Frater joins Better board
housing.what: Frater, whose role was effective March 23, brings experience spanning mortgage-backed securities and commercial real estate lending.

housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: US Mortgage hit with class-action suit over May 2025 data breach
housing.what: Suit alleges a May 2025 hack exposed US Mortgage employee data, claims weak controls and delayed notice, and seeks $5 million plus reforms.

housing.title: 14% of Home-Sale Agreements Fell Through Last Month–A Record for February
housing.what: House hunters have the upper hand, allowing them to abandon deals over price, repairs or second thoughts
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: U.S. Home Prices Barely Budged in February
housing.what: Home prices rose 0.1% month over month on a seasonally adjusted basis—the slowest growth in seven months
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: There Are 630,000 More Home Sellers Than Buyers—the Biggest Gap on Record
housing.what: When sellers outnumber buyers, the buyers who are in the market have bargaining power
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: February’s $30M+ Home Sales Cluster in Florida and NYC—Including Two in the Same Barrier Island Enclave
housing.what: Florida and New York dominated February’s ultra-luxury housing market, with oceanfront estates and Central Park condos going for more than $50 million
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

notables.title: Antitrust lawsuit against NAR faces dismissal
notables.what: Magistrate recommends dismissing Zea antitrust suit vs NAR without prejudice, cites deficient pleading and AI fake citations.

notables.title: TransUnion launches tool to bolster Realtor safety, fight fraud
notables.what: The app allows agents to validate legal property ownership before listing and conduct personal safety checks using a phone number.
notables.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
notables.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

notables.title: States push back on buyer agreements as new laws challenge NAR rules
notables.what: Mississippi and Alabama laws allow buyer tours without signed agreements, conflicting with the NAR settlement, as other states weigh bills.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: KB Home pivots to its build-to-order strengths, but not without risk

notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.
